rows.note: Summer schooling — lighter pace, NOT every weekday. Mom + Grandma decide which days have school each week. Fewer blocks per day. More adventures / read-aloud / choice / outdoor. Indian Hill 2025–26 ended Thu May 21; Reagan continues at her own summer rhythm. No tutors.

stdout:
note
Summer schooling — lighter pace, NOT every weekday. Mom + Grandma decide which days have school each week. Fewer blocks per day. More adventures / read-aloud / choice / outdoor. Indian Hill 2025–26 ended Thu May 21; Reagan continues at her own summer rhythm. No tutors.
